title: Focus on women: Mrs SA finalist on Women’s Day
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Stellie Taute, known to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Stellie Taute, known to most Mossel Bay residents as a Mrs South Africa 2025 finalist and the owner of the successful Loka Boutique, has this message for women this Women’s Month: “You are more than good enough and worthy of all.”","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Stellie Taute, known to most Mossel Bay residents as a Mrs South Africa 2025 finalist and the owner of the successful Loka Boutique, has this message for women this Women’s Month: “You are more than good enough and worthy of all.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Taute had been making and designing wedding dresses for 22 years before Loka came into existence. Afterwards, she went through a divorce and initially lost her passion for her work."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But designing and sewing were the only things she knew, and Loka Boutique was born, a proudly South African casualwear brand.","html":"But designing and sewing were the only things she knew, and Loka Boutique was born, a proudly South African casualwear brand."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Speaking about some of the challenges she faces, she said owning a business, especially a clothing factory, is quite demanding.","html":"Speaking about some of the challenges she faces, she said owning a business, especially a clothing factory, is quite demanding."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“With clothes being imported very cheaply from China and more, it’s quite difficult to compete, especially for me and others, printing our own fabrics at higher costs,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Running her own business and juggling the duties of a Mrs SA finalist can be quite a lot, but Taute manages with grace and ensures she always makes time for her family.","html":"Running her own business and juggling the duties of a Mrs SA finalist can be quite a lot, but Taute manages with grace and ensures she always makes time for her family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I come from a very loving family. My mum played a big part in my love of sewing,” she said. “I am blessed with two amazing boys and a husband, Willy. Willy and I are the proud grandparents of three beautiful children. We are a big happy combined family.”","html":"“I come from a very loving family. My mum played a big part in my love of sewing,” she said. “I am blessed with two amazing boys and a husband, Willy. Willy and I are the proud grandparents of three beautiful children. We are a big happy combined family.”"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Adding to her message for women this month, Taute urged them to do whatever scares them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We women often feel unworthy and not good enough. If you don’t believe in yourself, you can’t expect others to do so. You are fearfully and wonderfully made,” she said.","html":"“We women often feel unworthy and not good enough. If you don’t believe in yourself, you can’t expect others to do so. You are fearfully and wonderfully made,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Focus on women: Mrs SA finalist on Women’s Day
